details: Cleveland-Cliffs Steel Corporation(CLF)self-assesses IN, KY, MI, OH and Wash:
PA use tax on its purchases from Suppliers of taxable tangible personal Freight:
property or taxable services, and remits the tax directly to these States. This is
done under direct payment authority granted to CLF by the above States and
evidenced by direct pay certificates (see below). CLF direct payment
authority does NOT apply to tangible personal property that Supplier
incorporates into CLF real property. Per the tax laws of these States, the
Supplier is responsible for sales/use tax on its purchases of tangible personal
property that it incorporates into real property owned by Cleveland-Cliffs
Steel Corporation. CLF direct payment permit certificate numbers are as

This is done under direct payment authority granted to CLF by the above States and evidenced by direct pay certificates (see below). CLF direct payment authority does NOT apply to tangible personal property that Supplier incorporates into CLF real property. Per the tax laws of these States, the Supplier is responsible for sales/use tax on its purchases of tangible personal property that it incorporates into real property owned by Cleveland-Cliffs Steel Corporation.
